chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-329 of 2018. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For orders on MA-1674/18. For hearing of main case. 27.03.2019. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl: A.G alongwith Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIGP, Hyderabad Range. === None is present for the petitioner. Respondents No.8 and 13 are present in person. Learned Addl. A.G files statement dated 27.3.2019 alongwith comments of the respondents NO.2,3 and 7, same are taken on record. Perusal of record reveals that petitioner seeks directions to the extent that he may not be dispossessed illegally, however, he has annexed certain documents showing his title as well as possession of the disputed premises of the property. The documents as well as pleadings show that the matter requires evidence, for which, this Court has no jurisdiction and the same is barred under Article 212 of the Constituion of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, therefore, it would be proper for the petitioner to approach the proper forum by filing an appropriate application. Beside being not maintainable is hereby dismissed in default alongwith listed application. JUDGE. JUDGE. g
